items.title: Criminal Lawyer in Bangladesh
items.desc: Expert criminal defense for FIR cases, bail applications, trial representation, and criminal case handling across Bangladesh courts. Available for consultation at the Uttara chamber in Dhaka.

items.title: Divorce & Family Lawyer in Bangladesh
items.desc: Handle divorce procedure in Bangladesh, child custody, Muslim family law, mutual divorce, and all family court matters. Consultation available at the Uttara chamber, Dhaka.

items.title: Land & Property Lawyer in Bangladesh
items.desc: Resolve land dispute cases, property mutation, registration, land fraud, and title deed matters in Bangladesh courts. Visit our Uttara chamber in Dhaka for consultation.

items.title: Bail Lawyer in Bangladesh
items.desc: Fast bail applications, anticipatory bail, High Court bail matters, and urgent bail proceedings across Bangladesh courts. Available at the Uttara chamber, Dhaka.

items.title: Supreme Court Lawyer Bangladesh
items.desc: Expert representation in High Court Division cases, writ petitions, appellate matters, and constitutional litigation.

items.title: Company & Corporate Law
items.desc: Business formation, company disputes, partnerships, corporate compliance, and commercial legal matters.
